chunks.subject: A male runner in athletic gear.
chunks.action: A man performs a light, dynamic warm-up on a yoga mat next to his camper van. He jogs lightly in place and does side-to-side leg movements. He appears focused and is preparing for a physical activity.

setting.location: Exterior campsite in a wooded area.

chunks.editorial_notes: This is good B-roll to establish the character's routine and dedication. It works well in a pre-run preparation montage or as part of a lifestyle sequence.

key_moments.description: The man begins a dynamic warm-up on a yoga mat.
He continues his warm-up, shifting his weight from side to side.

items.caption_text: subject: A man in athletic wear and a cap. | action: He is performing a balance exercise or warm-up, standing on one leg with the other extended to the side, on a pink yoga mat. His arms are bent at the elbows, hands held in front of his chest. | setting: An outdoor campsite or natural area, with a large white and black 'Jayco Baja' camper trailer parked to his right. The ground is dry grass and dirt, and there are trees in the background under a hazy sky. | framing: wide | mood: Focused, active, preparatory, calm. | editorial_hooks: Man exercising next to a camper trailer; RV parked in a natural setting.
